content.en:
"With the supreme dimensional domain body, coupled with the three hundred and sixty-five dimensional rules, and the seven realms are extremely powerful, my current strength is extremely powerful in the eighth realm!"

However, Ye Tian's strength at this time was definitely far behind the Purple Yun Realm Lord who had not broken through before.

At the beginning, the Purple Yun Realm Lord, the soul will was the sixteenth dimension, and later he broke through to the seventeenth dimension, comprehended the Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Learning, and definitely comprehended the rules of the Supreme Dimension, and the multi-dimensional domain body was complete.

It can be said that his current strength is still far behind.

After stabilizing the realm, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the primordial star, and as for the supreme dimensional domain, he had to slowly improve, and he couldn't be raised to an extremely high realm at once.

After becoming the eighth realm, Ye Tian's comprehension was naturally improved, and it stands to reason that it was easier to comprehend the rules of the dimension.

However.

Ye Tian's dimensional rules had already reached the three hundred and sixty-fifth realm, and he could only comprehend the supreme dimensional rules if he continued to improve.

Fortunately, with the help of the Primal Star, he could still comprehend the rules of the highest dimension, but he also knew very well that it was not easy to comprehend the rules of the highest dimension, even if the efficiency of his comprehension was many times that of the other Eighth Realms, it would take a long time.

Another 100.

Ye Tian was still cultivating the Fog Soul Technique, using the breath of the Fog Pluto Star to refine his soul will, his soul will was now at the peak level of the fifteenth dimension, if he went further, he could raise his soul will to the sixteenth dimension level.

In order to be able to break through, Ye Tian also used up all the resources that helped to improve the will of the soul, plus the assistance of the aura of the misty pluto.

After a thousand years of penance.

this day.

Ye Tian's soul will finally broke through and reached the sixteenth dimension.

The soul will has broken through, and Ye Tian's strength has also increased a little, if he can improve the sixteenth dimensional soul will mastery, his strength will continue to skyrocket.

However, it will definitely not be possible in a short period of time.

"There is one more thing to do at the moment, and that is to occupy an area in the upper region and place some Terran extradimensional realms!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

On the side of the Four Thousand Territory, there are more and more extradimensional realms of the human race, and the number of extradimensional realms in the fifth realm is soaring, and even under his cultivation, some sixth realm extradimensional realms have been born.

However, the resources over there are undoubtedly too barren (bebi) to supply so many Terran powerhouses.

And the Upper Domain has countless resources and a vast territory, so he naturally wants to occupy a territory here to settle these Terran powerhouses.

For example, the human race that has cultivated above the fifth realm will arrange for some to come over.

So, he needs to occupy a territory.

Naturally, he would not snatch the territory of those powerful forces, and he had no interest in the territory of more than 3,000 places.

Ye Tian kept selecting plots, and finally took a fancy to a territory.

Two thousand three hundred territories.

This place is very good, rich in resources, and it is in the war phase during this time, and many forces are fighting to the death for resources.

His involvement in this period is not excessive.

......

Blackwater Family.

Phoenix Feather League.

White Mountain Chamber of Commerce.

Nine Leaves Sect.

These four forces are fighting very hotly in the territory of two thousand three hundred at the moment, and a large number of extradimensional realms have fallen.

The reason why they fought so fiercely was entirely because this multidimensional territory had actually given birth to a special ore vein, which was very valuable enough for the four of them to fight hard.

And the strength of these four forces is not weak, they all have a powerhouse of the eighth realm, and as for the existence of the seventh realm, there are even more.

this day.

Many of the seventh realms of these four forces were killed together, and in the end, the eighth realm behind the four forces made a move.

And as soon as he made a move, he shook the entire multi-dimensional territory.

The strength of the Black Water Realm Lord of the Black Water Family is the strongest, so he is a little arrogant.

"Everyone, the three of you quit, I can give you some compensation!"

The Black Water Realm Lord said.

The Phoenix Feather Realm Lord said coldly: "Black Water Realm Lord, your strength is not much stronger than ours, the three of us joining forces are enough to severely damage and even hopefully kill you!"

The four Eighth Realms are not convinced by anyone.

"Several, since you can't decide, why don't you hand over that vein to me!"

Hearing this, the faces of the four Eighth Realms changed.

They instantly understood that there were foreign forces involved!

Rumble!!!!!

The four of them in the Eighth Realm instantly united and unanimously outward.

Wow!

Ye Tian walked out of the dimensional void and stared at the four eighth realms.

"Early Stage of the Eighth Realm!"

The Black Water Realm Lord breathed a sigh of relief, thinking that it was an incomparably powerful Eighth Realm, but they didn't expect it to be just a new Eighth Realm.

Among them, the lowest cultivation is in the middle of the eighth realm, and the highest is the black water realm master, the late stage of the eighth realm.

Isn't it a very simple matter to crush an Eighth Realm Beginner with their strength?

However, they didn't do it immediately, for fear that Ye Tian's origin was not simple and he would offend a more powerful force.

"What do you mean?"

The Black Water Realm Lord asked.

"It's very simple, I want this vein, and I still have the 800,000 extradimensional realms here!" Ye Tian said in a commanding tone.

"Arrogance!"

The four Eighth Realms are angry.

Ye Tian is too arrogant, there are only more than three million extradimensional realms in the two thousand three hundred realms, and Ye Tian wants eight hundred thousand in one breath, this is not to directly snatch a point of their territory.

Where can they endure it?

"What kind of force is Your Excellency from?"

The Black Water Realm Lord forcibly endured the killing intent and asked.

"Terran!"

As soon as Ye Tian's voice fell, the four of them started directly.

They don't know any human race at all, as long as it's not the powerful forces they know, they don't have any fear at all.

Bang!!!!!

The four Eighth Realms made a move, how rare such a battle was, those Seventh Realms watched one after another, and they all felt that Ye Tian would be crushed by the four Eighth Realms.

However.

The result was beyond their expectations.

Ye Tian barely used too strong strength, and he didn't even use the Eight Realms Supreme Absolute Technique, he only used the Primal Domain Body and Phantom Domain Body of the Consummation Realm plus a part of the Dimensional Rule Realm.

Bang bang bang!!!

The four Eighth Realms were directly slapped away by Ye Tian, and their bodies were split one by one, and they were almost killed in seconds.

At this moment, they were terrified.

"Dimensional Domain!"

"Spare your life!"

They begged for mercy in an instant.

A person who has cultivated the eighth realm of the dimensional domain body, and the realm is extremely high, there is hope to impact the ninth realm, and these ordinary eighth realms are not opponents at all.

So, they admit it directly.
